articles.title: Bitcoin Bullish Signal: Exchange Outflows Spike Up
articles.description: On-chain data shows the Bitcoin exchange outflows have spiked up recently, a sign that could prove to be bullish for the crypto’s price. Bitcoin Exchange Netflow Has Observed Deep Red Values In Recent Days As pointed out by an analyst in a CryptoQuant post, investors have withdrawn more than 60k BTC from exchanges recently. The relevant indicator here is the “all exchanges netflow,” which...

articles.title: Binance Coin (BNB) Bulls Defends Key Zone, Will The Give Up?
articles.description: BNB price creates mixed feelings on the high timeframe as price forms a descending triangle on the daily chart while an ascending triangle forms on the weekly chart. BNB looks more stable as the price aims to flip the $340 resistance to set up a bullish sentiment. The price action of the Binance Coin (BNB) continues to look strong despite the price forming a bilateral chart pattern on the daily and weekly timeframe. articles.title: Here’s the full scope of Avalanche’s updates on AVAX’s price action
articles.description: Avalanche recently came into the limelight after several interesting developments happened in its ecosystem, each of which looked promising. For instance, the network recently partnered with Chainlink to join the SCALE program.
